project.name: LOTR YouTube Channel
project.description: Launch a faceless YouTube channel focused on Tolkien/Middle-earth lore

phases.name: Phase 1: Foundation (Tech)
phases.description: Build the content intelligence system - database, scraper, processing pipeline, and dashboard

cards.title: Session A: Scrape Real Data
cards.description: Populate database with actual competitor data. Creates a niche, links channel, downloads video metadata from Nerd of the Rings.
cards.success_criteria: Database has real competitor video data

cards.title: Session B: Manual Transcript Workflow
cards.description: Create empty transcript files for manual population since YouTube blocked auto-scraping. Workaround for API limitations.
cards.success_criteria: data/transcripts/ folder has empty .txt files for each video

cards.title: Session C: Transcript Import to Database
cards.description: Script to read manually-pasted transcripts from .txt files and store them in the database linked to videos.
cards.success_criteria: Can import transcripts and link to videos with has_transcript flag

cards.title: Session D: PDF Ingestion for Canon Sources
cards.description: Import Tolkien source books (The Hobbit, LOTR, etc.) into the system. Extract text and store for searching.
cards.success_criteria: Can ingest a PDF and see it in canon_sources table

cards.title: Session E: Chunking and Embeddings
cards.description: The AI brain of the system. Split texts into chunks, convert to vectors for semantic search. Store in LanceDB.
cards.success_criteria: LanceDB has embedded chunks from a canon source

cards.title: Session F: Semantic Search
cards.description: Search by meaning across canon and transcripts. Powers the Research page in the dashboard.
cards.success_criteria: Semantic search returns relevant passages with relevance scores

cards.title: Session G: Glossary Builder
cards.description: Extract character names, places, and special terms from canon sources for consistent tagging and transcript cleaning.
cards.success_criteria: Glossary populated with terms extracted from canon source

cards.title: Session H: Basic Streamlit App
cards.description: Visual interface shell with navigation sidebar, page routing, and niche selector.
cards.success_criteria: Streamlit app runs at localhost:8501 with working navigation

cards.title: Session I: Settings Page
cards.description: Manage API keys and view system status without editing config files.
cards.success_criteria: Can view/test API keys and see database stats

cards.title: Session J: Niche Setup Page
cards.description: Configuration hub for niches, source books, competitor channels, and glossary management.
cards.success_criteria: Can manage niches, upload sources, add competitors, edit glossary via UI

cards.title: Session K: Competitive Intel Page
cards.description: Analyze competition - browse videos, see topics covered, find gaps. Includes manual transcript import UI.
cards.success_criteria: Can browse competitor videos, filter, sort, and manually import transcripts

cards.title: Session L: Research Page
cards.description: Research assistant - semantic search across canon and competitor transcripts. The core value of the system.
cards.success_criteria: Can search, filter by source type, see results with relevance scores and copy quotes

phases.name: Phase 2: Channel Setup
phases.description: Brand identity, visual assets, and YouTube channel configuration

cards.title: Session M: Brainstorm Channel Name
cards.description: MANUAL: Creative brainstorming session. Generate 5-10 name options, check availability on YouTube and social platforms.
cards.success_criteria: Final channel name chosen and verified available on YouTube, Twitter/X, Instagram

cards.title: Session M2: Write Channel Description
cards.description: MANUAL: Write 2-3 sentence channel description and define tagline/hook. Consider target audience and unique value proposition.
cards.success_criteria: Channel description and tagline documented

subphases.name: 2.2 Branding Assets
subphases.description: Logo, banner, colors, fonts, thumbnail style

cards.title: Session N: Create Channel Logo
cards.description: MANUAL: Design or generate channel logo. Use Leonardo.ai, Midjourney, or Canva. Should work at small sizes. Save as square PNG 800x800+.
cards.success_criteria: Logo file created, looks professional at small sizes

cards.title: Session N2: Create Channel Banner
cards.description: MANUAL: Design channel banner (2560x1440px). Include channel name and tagline. Keep important content centered (edges crop on mobile).
cards.success_criteria: Banner file created at correct dimensions

cards.title: Session N3: Define Brand Style
cards.description: MANUAL: Choose 2-3 brand colors and 1-2 fonts. Sketch thumbnail style template. Document in a brand guide.
cards.success_criteria: Brand colors, fonts, and thumbnail style documented

subphases.name: 2.3 YouTube Account Setup
subphases.description: Create and configure the actual YouTube channel

cards.title: Session O: Create YouTube Channel
cards.description: MANUAL: Create YouTube channel, upload logo/banner, write About section, add keywords, configure upload defaults, create initial playlists.
cards.success_criteria: Channel exists, looks professional, About section complete, playlists created

cards.title: Session O2: Reserve Social Handles
cards.description: MANUAL: Reserve Twitter/X handle, Instagram handle, and create simple Linktree or bio page.
cards.success_criteria: Social handles secured matching channel name

phases.name: Phase 3: Competitive Research
phases.description: Analyze competitors, identify gaps, and prioritize video topics

subphases.name: 3.1 Data Gathering
subphases.description: Scrape more competitors and gather transcripts

cards.title: Session P: Scrape Additional Competitors
cards.description: Add more LOTR/Tolkien channels to the database using the scraper. Get broader view of content landscape.
cards.success_criteria: 5+ competitor channels scraped, 100+ videos in database

cards.title: Session Q: Gather Priority Transcripts
cards.description: MANUAL: Use dashboard to manually import transcripts for top 20-30 highest-view videos. Time-consuming but valuable data.
cards.success_criteria: 20-30 transcripts imported for top-performing competitor videos

cards.title: Session R: Analyze and Document Findings
cards.description: MANUAL: Use Research page to search topics, cross-reference with canon, identify saturated vs underserved topics. Create ranked opportunity list.
cards.success_criteria: Ranked list of 10-20 video topic opportunities with gap analysis

phases.name: Phase 4: Canon Ingestion
phases.description: Load Tolkien source books into the system

cards.title: Session S: Gather Source PDFs
cards.description: MANUAL: Obtain PDFs of The Hobbit, LOTR, and The Silmarillion. Ensure good text quality for extraction.
cards.success_criteria: PDF files ready for ingestion

cards.title: Session S2: Ingest Canon Sources
cards.description: Use dashboard or script to ingest Tolkien PDFs. Extract text, chunk, embed, and populate glossary.
cards.success_criteria: Canon sources searchable via Research page, glossary populated

phases.name: Phase 5: First Video - Pre-Production
phases.description: Select topic, research, and write the script

cards.title: Session T: Select First Video Topic
cards.description: MANUAL: Review gap analysis, select topic that balances audience interest, canon material availability, and personal interest. Define unique angle.
cards.success_criteria: First video topic selected with documented reasoning and unique angle

cards.title: Session U: Research Topic
cards.description: Use Research page to gather canon passages, note key facts and quotes, identify story arc and visual moments.
cards.success_criteria: Research document with canon quotes, facts, and outline

cards.title: Session U2: Write Script
cards.description: Write full video script: hook (30s), intro, main content sections, conclusion, CTA. Mark [IMAGE] cues. Target 2000-3000 words.
cards.success_criteria: Complete script with image markers, 10-15 minute target length

cards.title: Session U3: Fact-Check Script Against Canon
cards.description: Review script accuracy against canon sources. Verify quotes, dates, names, relationships. Fix any errors.
cards.success_criteria: Script verified accurate against canon sources

cards.title: Session V: Choose Voice Approach
cards.description: MANUAL: Decide between AI voice (ElevenLabs), own voice, or hired voice actor. If AI, test several voices with sample script section.
cards.success_criteria: Voice approach decided, test samples reviewed if AI

cards.title: Session V2: Generate/Record Voiceover
cards.description: Generate full voiceover using chosen method. Review for issues, re-record problem sections. Export as MP3/WAV.
cards.success_criteria: Complete voiceover audio file ready for editing

subphases.name: 6.2 Image Generation Pipeline
subphases.description: Set up and use AI image generation for visuals

cards.title: Session W: Research LOTR Art Styles
cards.description: MANUAL: Research Tolkien artists (Alan Lee, John Howe, Ted Nasmith, etc.). Collect 3-5 example images per artist. Note distinctive style characteristics.
cards.success_criteria: Reference folder with example images, documented style notes for each artist
expansion_hints: May want separate cards per artist if going deep
Could expand into: research → collect → document → test prompts

cards.title: Session W2: Set Up Google Cloud Imagen API
cards.description: MANUAL: Create Google Cloud project, enable Imagen API, configure authentication, get API credentials. Add to .env file.
cards.success_criteria: Google Cloud project configured, Imagen API enabled, credentials in .env

cards.title: Session W3: Create Image Prompt Skill
cards.description: Create Claude skill that generates detailed Imagen prompts based on scene descriptions and chosen art style. Reference style examples.
cards.success_criteria: Skill file created that outputs high-quality image prompts
expansion_hints: May want one skill per art style
Could expand: base skill → Alan Lee variant → John Howe variant → etc.
Test and iterate based on output quality

cards.title: Session W4: Create Imagen API Script
cards.description: Write Python script that takes prompt from skill output and calls Imagen API. Handle auth, request, save images with sensible naming.
cards.success_criteria: Script generates images from prompts and saves to specified folder

cards.title: Session W5: Test Image Pipeline End-to-End
cards.description: Test full workflow: describe scene → skill generates prompt → script calls Imagen → review output quality. Iterate on prompt skill if needed.
cards.success_criteria: Can generate quality images matching intended style from scene descriptions

subphases.name: 6.3 Visual Asset Creation
subphases.description: Generate all images needed for the video

cards.title: Session X: List All Images Needed
cards.description: Go through script and list every image needed. Characters, locations, concepts, maps. Note timestamp/section for each.
cards.success_criteria: Complete image list with descriptions mapped to script sections

cards.title: Session X2: Generate Video Images
cards.description: Use image pipeline to generate all needed images. May need multiple attempts for quality. Organize by script section.
cards.success_criteria: All images generated and organized, named by script timestamp

cards.title: Session X3: Source Maps and Diagrams
cards.description: MANUAL: Find or create any maps, family trees, timelines needed. Check Tolkien wiki and fan resources. Note attributions.
cards.success_criteria: All supplementary visuals gathered with attribution notes

cards.title: Session Y: Choose Editing Software
cards.description: MANUAL: Install and familiarize with DaVinci Resolve (free, powerful) or CapCut (easier). Watch a tutorial if needed.
cards.success_criteria: Editing software installed and basic workflow understood

cards.title: Session Y2: Edit Video
cards.description: MANUAL: Import voiceover, place images aligned to narration, add Ken Burns motion, text overlays, background music, sound effects. Export 1080p/4K.
cards.success_criteria: Complete video exported, synced audio/visuals, professional quality
expansion_hints: First edit takes longest - may want to break into: rough cut → add motion → add text → add music → final polish

cards.title: Session Z: Create Thumbnail
cards.description: MANUAL: Design thumbnail in Canva - eye-catching image, 3-5 words bold text, high contrast, readable at small size. Create 2-3 versions.
cards.success_criteria: 2-3 thumbnail versions at 1280x720px, readable on mobile

cards.title: Session AA: Write Video Metadata
cards.description: Write compelling title with keywords, description with hook/timestamps/links/hashtags, select 10-15 tags.
cards.success_criteria: Title, description, and tags ready for upload

cards.title: Session AB: Upload and Publish
cards.description: MANUAL: Upload video to YouTube (unlisted first), add metadata, select thumbnail, preview, then publish or schedule.
cards.success_criteria: Video published to YouTube and publicly visible

cards.title: Session AC: Share and Monitor
cards.description: MANUAL: Share on social media if set up. Monitor first 24-48 hours, respond to comments, note CTR and retention in YouTube Studio.
cards.success_criteria: Video shared, initial metrics documented, comments responded to

cards.title: Session AD: Document Lessons Learned
cards.description: MANUAL: Write up what worked, what took too long, what to improve. Update workflow for next video.
cards.success_criteria: Lessons learned documented for process improvement

variables.name: YOUTUBE_API_KEY
variables.description: YouTube Data API key for scraping

variables.name: GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT
variables.description: Google Cloud project ID for Imagen API

variables.name: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS
variables.description: Path to Google Cloud service account JSON

variables.name: ELEVENLABS_API_KEY
variables.description: ElevenLabs API key for voice generation
